title: Local chromatin context dictates the genetic determinants of the heterochromatin spreading reaction. Analysis Code, Numerical and Primary data.
author: Greenstein, RA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Uploaded under this Zenodo DOI is the following: 

 1. the Analysis Code used for Flow Cytometry analysis in the paper, GO complex analysis (Figure 3) and Hit visualization (Figure 1, 2 S1, S4 Figs). 

 2. The primary Flow Cytometry data from both the initial screen (ScreenFlowFCS) and validation experiments (ValidationFlowFCS) are included as .zip files. 

 3. a .zip folder is uploaded that contains all the analysis code for the ChIP-Seq experiments.  

 4. Excel worksheets that contain the numerical source data for all qPCR bar plots.
steps_raw:
Uploaded under this Zenodo DOI is the following: 

 1. the Analysis Code used for Flow Cytometry analysis in the paper, GO complex analysis (Figure 3) and Hit visualization (Figure 1, 2 S1, S4 Figs). 

 2. The primary Flow Cytometry data from both the initial screen (ScreenFlowFCS) and validation experiments (ValidationFlowFCS) are included as .zip files. 

 3. a .zip folder is uploaded that contains all the analysis code for the ChIP-Seq experiments.  

 4. Excel worksheets that contain the numerical source data for all qPCR bar plots.
